user.title: VIP Parker
user.description: Enter the phone number you use with VIP Parker to receive an SMS code.

code.title: Enter code
code.description: Enter the SMS code. It can take a couple of minutes to arrive.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate VIP Parker
reauth_confirm.description: Your VIP Parker session has expired. Confirm your phone number to receive a new SMS code.

reauth_code.title: Enter code
reauth_code.description: Enter the SMS code. It can take a couple of minutes to arrive.

error.send_failed: Could not send a code. Check the phone number and country code.

abort.already_configured: This account is already set up.
abort.wrong_account: That phone number belongs to a different VIP Parker account. Re-authenticate with the account this entry was set up with.
